problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region may resolve Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
